title: Discovered
description: Captured, but not defeated. The truth begins to emerge.

opening.speaker: Father
opening.text: I'm so sorry. I never wanted you involved in this. The Order... they're obsessed with controlling time itself.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: This Device. Can it really work?

opening.speaker: Father
opening.text: No. Maybe. No. It was a thought experiment, nothing more. But I made the mistake of showing my ideas to the wrong person. The Order believes it can reshape history, undo their regrets.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: Why do they think they can force you to build it?

opening.speaker: Father
opening.text: Because once, many years ago, I had a theory. I built a prototype, just a little thing. But the wrong person found it. I thought I had destroyed it, but it was too late.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: So it isn't really theoretical then?

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Your father's eyes flit to the door, then back to you.

opening.speaker: Father
opening.text: We dont have time to talk about this now... They're  trying to force me to complete the device, but I can't. I won't. It will never be what she wants.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: The door bursts open. Cultists surround you.

opening.speaker: Guildmaster
opening.text: How touching. A family reunion.

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: Vera, behind me. Now.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: The woman stares at you with blind eyes. She looks familiar.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: I... know you.

opening.speaker: Guildmaster
opening.text: I would think you might.

opening.speaker: Father
opening.text: Liona, stop.

opening.speaker: Guildmaster
opening.text: Come closer my love. My eyes are not what they once where...

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: You're the old woman we met in front of the Clockworker's Guild. I gave you a penny.

opening.speaker: Guildmaster
opening.text: You did. What a kind young woman you have turned out to be.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: You find yourself strangely drawn towards this woman.

opening.speaker: Father
opening.text: LIONA, NO!

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: Suddenly, the crystal in her walking stick illuminates. The light is blinding. You can hear your father and friends shouting in the distance, and then everything goes black.

opening.speaker: Guildmaster
opening.text: Listen to me.

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: I'm listening...

opening.speaker: Guildmaster
opening.text: Once upon a time, there was a little girl. She had a mother and a father...

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: and a Bear to protect her, and a raccoon to love her...

opening.speaker: Guildmaster
opening.text: She had a mother that loved her very much. The father took something from the mother, and sent her far far away...

opening.speaker: Veracity
opening.text: I am far far away...

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: In the distance, you can hear Addie. She's roaring. You can hear screaming, who is screaming? Everything is so black

opening.speaker: Addie
opening.text: If ANY of you touch her again. I will kill you all.

opening.speaker: Narrator
opening.text: you fade to black again
